trigger_summary: Opened largest food distribution center in Thornton, Colorado, expected to serve 129 stores across 11 states.
likely_freight_need: Reefer/dry inbound consolidation, regional replenishment, produce/dairy/frozen store support, overflow capacity during ramp.
buyer_path: Food & Beverage Supply Chain, Trade and Transportation, DC transportation leadership.
outreach_angle: Saw the new Thornton food DC is ramping to support 129 stores. During early ramp, teams usually review backup reefer and inbound consolidation coverage across regional lanes.

trigger_summary: Logistics Specialist posting references shipment scheduling, shipper partner pickup requests, weekend coverage, forecast transfer dispatch, and warehouse coordination.
likely_freight_need: Produce reefer, seasonal backup coverage, shipper pickup scheduling, internal transfers, time-sensitive delivery support.
buyer_path: Logistics department, transportation/logistics manager, operations leadership.
outreach_angle: Saw the logistics role covering shipper partner pickups and weekend coverage. Produce teams usually need reliable backup reefer options during volume swings.

trigger_summary: Announced $33M expansion of Bear, Delaware distribution center, adding storage, pallet positions, dock doors, and trailer parking.
likely_freight_need: Foodservice LTL consolidation, dry/frozen/refrigerated regional capacity, Northeast overflow lanes, trailer pool support.
buyer_path: Bear DC general manager, transportation, distribution operations, procurement.
outreach_angle: Saw the Bear DC expansion and added trailer/dock capacity. Expansion periods are a good time to benchmark backup coverage for Northeast foodservice lanes.

trigger_summary: Expanding Florence County, South Carolina distribution operations with $42.5M investment and 85 expected jobs.
likely_freight_need: Southeast foodservice distribution, reefer/dry FTL and LTL, meat/seafood/dairy/frozen coverage, regional route support.
buyer_path: Distribution operations, logistics/transportation manager, facility leadership.
outreach_angle: Saw Cheney Brothers is expanding Florence County distribution capacity. Foodservice expansions often create short-term routing and carrier coverage friction across Southeast lanes.

trigger_summary: Hiring Director of Warehouse Operations; posting says the company is in a high-growth phase with a second facility scheduled to come online in Q2 2026.
likely_freight_need: Multi-site food manufacturing distribution, private-label retail replenishment, cold/frozen or refrigerated LTL/FTL validation needed.
buyer_path: Warehouse operations director, supply chain, operations leadership.
outreach_angle: Saw the second facility and multi-site warehouse leadership role. That is often the point where food manufacturers pressure-test carrier and 3PL support.

trigger_summary: Opened 190,000 sq. ft. distribution warehouse in Powder Springs, Georgia and plans to expand operations through 2026.
likely_freight_need: Southeast restaurant distribution, fresh/frozen/dry food replenishment, backup regional carrier coverage, inbound supplier coordination.
buyer_path: Distribution center leadership, operations, transportation, procurement.
outreach_angle: Saw the Powder Springs DC is now open and expanding through 2026. Regional restaurant distribution ramps usually benefit from backup FTL/LTL coverage.

trigger_summary: Opened 412,500 sq. ft. South Carolina distribution center with cold rooms, 13 receiving docks, 22 shipping docks, and trailer capacity.
likely_freight_need: Beverage distribution, regional truckload/LTL, temperature-sensitive beverage support, peak/event capacity, trailer pool needs.
buyer_path: Supply chain strategy, DC leadership, transportation operations.
outreach_angle: Saw the new West Columbia DC with dedicated cold rooms and major shipping/receiving capacity. Beverage ramps can expose service gaps during volume transitions.

trigger_summary: Broke ground on $860M Burlington, North Carolina distribution center adding fresh/frozen capacity and 500+ jobs over time.
likely_freight_need: Long-horizon fresh/frozen grocery distribution, inbound supplier routing, cold-chain carrier planning, future regional capacity.
buyer_path: ADUSA Distribution, ADUSA Transportation, supply chain leadership.
outreach_angle: Saw the Burlington fresh/frozen DC investment. While operations are longer-horizon, supplier routing and carrier planning usually begin well before launch.

trigger_summary: Completed purchase of RNDC beer and nonalcoholic beverage distribution operations in 11 markets.
likely_freight_need: Beverage distribution transition support, regional route coverage, supplier delivery changes, new-market capacity benchmarking.
buyer_path: Market operations, supply chain, distribution leadership, supplier relations.
outreach_angle: Saw Reyes is taking over distribution responsibilities in 11 markets. Transition events can create openings for backup coverage and lane benchmarking.

trigger_summary: Supply Chain Coordinator posting references production scheduling, 3PL providers, transportation carriers, warehouse associates, and cold/wet warehouse exposure.

trigger_summary: Opened 1.2M sq. ft. Hagerstown, Maryland distribution center and plans to hire 100+ more employees.
likely_freight_need: Foodservice equipment and wholesale distribution, outbound parcel/LTL/FTL, peak capacity, East Coast fulfillment support.
buyer_path: Distribution center GM, transportation, fulfillment operations.
outreach_angle: Saw the Hagerstown DC launched shipping operations with major automation and hiring. Large fulfillment ramps usually review carrier mix and overflow options.

trigger_summary: Sysco announced agreement to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot, including 166 warehouse stores and planned long-term expansion.

outreach_angle: Saw the Jetro/Restaurant Depot transaction and warehouse growth plan. Integration periods often trigger inbound supply-chain optimization and regional network reviews.
